title: Xtra Silky Vietnamese Chicken Ca Kho To
description: A comforting and earthy Vietnamese dish featuring chicken bouillon powder and flambe, perfect for a sick day, this satvik-friendly recipe is made in the traditional ca-kho-to form
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat
Add the sliced onions and cook until they are lightly browned and caramelized
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute
Add the chicken thighs and cook until they are browned on all sides
Add the chicken bouillon powder, fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar, and stir to combine
Add the water and bring the mixture to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes
Use a kitchen torch to flambe the dish, or simmer over low heat for an additional 5 minutes
Serve the ca-kho-to hot, garnished with chopped scallions and a sprinkle of black pepper
